nasb.text: He had thirty sons who rode on thirty donkeys, and they had thirty cities in the land of Gilead that are called Havvoth-jair to this day.

esv.text: And he had thirty sons who rode on thirty donkeys, and they had thirty cities, called Havvoth-jair to this day, which are in the land of Gilead.

cnv.text: 他有三十個兒子，騎著三十頭驢駒；他們有三十座城，叫作哈倭特．睚珥，直到今日都是在基列地。

ccb.text: 他有三十个儿子，每人骑一头驴。他们在基列拥有三十座城，那些城到现在还叫“雅珥之城”。
